text:
OS: FBSD-12.2
Port: x11/mate-panel
ports tree updated via portsnap: 2021-11-23

No apparent problems with "make configure" or "make".

"make install", however, fails with the message:

pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/x11/mate-panel/work/stage/
            usr/local/share/glib-2.0/schemas/
            org.mate.panel.applet.window-list-previews.gschema.xml:
No such file or directory

The stated xml file does exist in "work/make-panel-1.26.1/applets/wncklet/..
             ..gschema.xml.in | ..gschema-xml"


Log files for all three steps above are available if requested.
